title: UTILITY ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: BAKER COUNTY UTILITY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with electric, gas, heating fuel, and water payments. 2810 Cedar Street Baker City, OR 97814 Eligibility: Must meet income limits Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-4pm Email (541) 523-6591 1505 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 523-6591 Main phone Person (541) 523-6591 ext 1505 Kim Close [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or to make an appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income AREA SERVED: Baker County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-4pm Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Service Payment Assistance Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY FOOD - HOME DELIVERED MEALS HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORTIVE SERVICES FOR VETERAN FAMILIES INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM TRANSPORTATION - PUBLIC TRANSIT TRANSPORTATION - VETERAN TRANSPORTATION SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BAKER COUNTY
